note: Curated queue of single, auto-settleable, always-placeable markets. The Model autopilot consumes these in kickoff order; the site shows them as the picks board. Keep selections to auto types (over_goals/under_goals/btts/team_win/double_chance) so they settle themselves. Already-finished matches are removed.

picks.why: Spain dominate possession and chance volume; should clear 1.5 comfortably.
picks.whyRisk: Saudi may park the bus chasing a 1-0; Spain were held 0-0 by Cape Verde once already.

picks.why: Belgium carry the attacking quality to push the game past one goal.
picks.whyRisk: Iran defend deep and well; a tight low-scoring game is live.

picks.why: Uruguay are far stronger than debutants Cape Verde and shouldn't lose.
picks.whyRisk: Low — only a genuine shock loss hurts.

picks.why: Ecuador are the clear favourites vs a debutant side and should create chances.
picks.whyRisk: Curaçao sit deep; Ecuador can be wasteful, so keep the line at 1.5.

picks.why: Japan are sharp going forward; enough quality to open the game up.
picks.whyRisk: Tunisia are organised and defensive; could keep it tight.

picks.why: France's firepower vs a leaky Iraq (conceded 4 to Norway) points to goals.
picks.whyRisk: Only a heavy France rotation + cagey Iraq could threaten it.

picks.why: Argentina's attack should produce; Austria also score goals.
picks.whyRisk: Argentina can be game-managers when qualified; a controlled 1-0 is possible.

picks.why: Two strong attacking sides (Norway hit 4 vs Iraq); goals likely.
picks.whyRisk: A tense must-win could tighten it up.

picks.why: Portugal have far more quality and should break Uzbekistan down.
picks.whyRisk: Uzbekistan defend in numbers; keep the line modest.

picks.why: England looked open (4-2 v Croatia); both sides can score.
picks.whyRisk: England can also game-manage if already through.

picks.why: Colombia impressed (3-1 v Uzbekistan) and are the stronger side.
picks.whyRisk: Low — only a surprise defeat hurts.
A dead rubber could be cautious if both are already qualified.

picks.why: Brazil have the clear quality edge and shouldn't lose to Scotland.
picks.whyRisk: Low — Brazil might rest players, but DC covers a draw.

picks.why: Morocco's quality vs debutants Haiti should yield goals.
picks.whyRisk: Haiti defend deep; Morocco can be wasteful, so 1.5 not 2.5.
